name: nodefield
title: Nodefield
description: A local-first infinite canvas for turning notes, sources, insights, and tasks into a connected visual knowledge field.
promise: Turn scattered notes, sources, and next actions into a connected visual field that stays on your device and exports cleanly.
workflows: Capture a typed card directly on the canvas.
Connect cards to express evidence, inference, and next actions.
Edit selected card details without leaving spatial context.
Search and focus a card in a large board.
Import, export, and recover a board without an account.
success_criteria: Users can create, edit, connect, move, duplicate, and delete cards.
Board data and viewport survive a full reload.
Native JSON and JSON Canvas files validate before replacing current data.
The core workflow remains usable at 390px, 768px, and 1440px viewport widths.
Unit tests, type checking, production build, and browser smoke checks pass.
validation_steps: Verify create-edit-connect-search-export-import in a real browser.
Inspect desktop and mobile screenshots for clipping, overlap, and blank canvas output.

must_have: Infinite pan and zoom with selection, connections, deletion, controls, and minimap
Typed note, source, insight, and task cards
Contextual inspector for title, body, status, and tags
Versioned local autosave with starter-board recovery
Undo, redo, search, focus, native JSON, and JSON Canvas import/export

data_model: BoardDocument owns schemaVersion, metadata, nodes, edges, viewport, and updatedAt
Application card data is independent from renderer-specific component state
Import/export adapters validate untrusted files before state replacement
integrations: StorageAdapter, SyncAdapter, and AgentAdapter boundaries for later versions
